items.title: Solana stablecoin volume hits record $650 billion in February as onchain payments draw demand, Grayscale says
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in Solana's stablecoin volume indicates strong on-chain payment activity, enhancing liquidity and positioning within the broader crypto ecosystem.

items.title: $BANK Sale Begins on Solana, Targeting Poker Staking Market
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of the $BANK sale on Solana taps into the growing poker staking market, potentially increasing user engagement and ecosystem utility.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Solana (SOL) gains 5.6%, leading index higher
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's 5.6% gain reflects positive market sentiment and could attract further investment, boosting its overall market position and liquidity.
